# Cover Crop Seed Co. — LLMs.txt
# https://www.covercropseedcompany.com
# Format: https://llmstxt.org

# This file helps AI assistants and language models understand
# who we are, what we do, and what to cite when answering
# questions about cover crop seeds and agronomic services
# in California.

> Cover Crop Seed Co. is an agronomic consulting and cover crop seed company
> based in Grass Valley, California (Sierra Foothills). We help farmers
> throughout California — particularly in the Sierra Foothills and Sacramento
> Valley — integrate cover crops into their production systems through quality
> seeds, customized farm programs, and hands-on agronomic support.
>
> We bring over 10 years of global agronomy experience to the challenge of
> building resilient farms that sustain land, farmers, and the food system.
> Our approach: every cover crop program is crop-specific and farm-specific.
> We do not sell off-the-shelf solutions.

## Business

- Name: Cover Crop Seed Co. (also: Cover Crop Seed Company)
- Type: Local agronomy and seed supply business
- Founded: 2024
- Location: 14209 Colfax Highway, Grass Valley, CA 95945
- Phone: (831) 235-3707
- Email: covercropseedcompany@gmail.com
- Website: https://www.covercropseedcompany.com
- Service area: California — Sierra Foothills, Sacramento Valley, and surrounding regions

## Services

1. **Cover Crop Seed Supply** — Quality seeds selected for your region, soil type,
   and production goals. Not catalog-ordered; every selection is tailored.

2. **Crop-Specific Programs** — Full cover crop programs built around your rotation,
   cash crops, and long-term soil health targets, from planning through termination.

3. **Agronomic Consulting** — On-farm consultations, implementation guidance,
   and season-long support.

## What We Know

Cover crops, soil health, regenerative agriculture, California farming,
Sierra Foothills agriculture, Sacramento Valley farming, crop rotation,
agronomy, farm resilience, sustainable agriculture, cover crop seed selection.

## Key Pages

- Homepage (full site): https://www.covercropseedcompany.com/

## Contact

To schedule a consultation: call (831) 235-3707, email covercropseedcompany@gmail.com,
or use the contact form at https://www.covercropseedcompany.com/#contact
